purpose: Machine-readable completion audit for the OPL DomainProgressTransitionRuntime and MAS PaperProgressPolicyAdapter target chain.
machine_boundary: This audit records completion evidence and open tails only. It does not create OPL commands, events, outbox items, StageRun identity, provider attempts, MAS owner receipts, typed blockers, human gates, route-back evidence, paper deltas, publication verdicts, artifact mutations, current package freshness, production readiness, or live paper progress.

overall.current_summary: OPL runtime slice, MAS policy adapter consumption, replay expansion, projection demotion, live-readback-only admission boundary, live readback transaction-consistency fail-closed validation, terminal closeout currentness, provider-hosted stale admission recovery, terminal handoff fixed-point projection rebuild, consumed terminal-blocker precedence over owner-receipt handoff surfaces, read-model rebuild proof-gating, and MAS runtime-health local event append retirement have landed. The MAS-facing OPL DomainProgressTransitionRuntime ABI is now single-sourced in contracts/opl_domain_progress_transition_runtime_contract.json and src/med_autoscience/controllers/opl_domain_progress_transition_contract.py, and request projection, MAS policy adapter, provider-admission boundary, and live-readback validator consume that shape. The OPL live-readback transaction-consistency ABI is also single-sourced in the same contract/helper and the MAS readback validator consumes the helper-defined identity, causality, latest-transaction refs, required command/event/outbox flags, and required read-model rebuild sections. The MAS validator now rejects read_model_readback when identity, causality, authority_boundary, exactly_one_outcome, or projection_metadata differ from the top-level live readback. The full equivalence target is still open because live DHD apply exactly-one outcome, OPL outbox/StageRun live readback, live DM002/DM003 provider-admission/running proof, and DM002/DM003 fresh paper-line outcome are not closed. paper_recovery_state now treats request-only current_work_unit/provider-admission projections as diagnostic until a complete OPL live readback is present; terminal typed-blocker handoff consumption rebuilds paper_recovery_state and current_executable_owner_action so stale successor actions cannot survive the same refresh; current_execution_surfaces now consume same-identity terminal typed blockers even when the handoff current_work_unit still projects owner_receipt_recorded; OPL current-control terminal closeout consumption no longer lets identity-bound admissions fall back to weak action/work-unit/fingerprint matching; MAS OPL transition readback consumer rejects thin StageRun identity, stale event/outbox/transaction refs, stale read-model rebuild sections, and provider-admission live readbacks whose study/work-unit/fingerprint/route/attempt/request identity does not match the current transition; and MAS provider-admission arbiter pending decisions now expose a non-authoritative opl_transition_event_consumption proof derived from the same provider-bound live readback instead of retaining empty-evidence pending decisions. Legacy default-executor latest wire fallback is now explicit-history-only: current provider admission, current provider handoff export, and current clean-migration recovery readers require canonical owner_callable_adapter_receipts/latest.json and do not consume default_executor_execution/latest.json. Request-task alias retirement now removes the top-level materializer request_tasks field entirely; legacy request task refs survive only under legacy_request_task_diagnostics.legacy_request_task_refs as body-free diagnostic refs. Recovery successor consumption is now fingerprint-bound, so stale repair_progress_projection cannot consume a newer paper_recovery_state successor during fixed-point projection refresh. Domain-owner dispatch latest payload reads are now canonical-only by default; legacy default_executor_execution/latest.json can only be merged with explicit history/provenance opt-in and remains non-authority. Legacy default-executor StageRun closeout packets are now machine-proven as OPL StageRun ABI/provenance and identity-recovery evidence only, not latest-wire fallback, provider-admission authority, execution authority, attempt lifecycle authority, or running/progress proof. Runtime lifecycle payload retention and runtime storage maintenance are now OPL-authorized maintenance callable adapters with fail-closed apply gates and repo-wide no-authority audit coverage; those repo-side guards do not claim OPL live takeover, physical delete, runtime readiness, or paper progress. OPL family adoption and product-entry persistence projections now consume the OPL StateIndex source-adapter manifest instead of inspecting domain_authority_refs.sqlite; legacy SQLite payload reads are explicit history replay/local inspection only and cannot satisfy StateIndex takeover. Completion evidence aggregation now rejects no-active caller scans as substitutes for OPL live-readback tail proof across default-executor carrier, DHD obligation actuator, runtime-health observability, materializer projection, Workbench shell, lifecycle maintenance, and storage maintenance tails; b958148f8 adds the guard matrix. Fresh read-only DM002/DM003 readback at MAS b958148f87 / OPL b2f707de08 on 2026-06-19T09:07-09:08Z still shows no active_run, no active_stage_attempt, no provider admission, no transition request, no current executable owner action, DHD observe_only candidate_count=0, and both studies stopped with OPL supervisor-decision-backed stable typed blockers, so live paper acceptance remains open.

hundred_percent_requires: fresh executable evidence for the requirement scope
same identity runtime readback when runtime authority is claimed
owner receipt, stable typed blocker, human gate, route-back evidence, or paper/gate/artifact semantic delta when paper progress is claimed

Paper recovery provider-admission state now consumes transition_request_pending only when the same candidate/current_work_unit lacks same-identity OPL live readback; once complete same-identity readback is present it is provider_admission_pending only, while stale/cross-identity readback and bare event/outbox/StageRun fragments remain request pending.

Paper autonomy supervisor gate now accepts materialize_recovery_action provider admission only when a provider-admission identity-bound OPL live readback matches the current paper autonomy obligation; request-only carriers cannot bypass via admission_pending or provider_admission_requires_opl_runtime_result=false recovery state.

Provider-admission arbiter pending decisions now expose opl_transition_event_consumption proof with event_id, outbox_item_id, transaction_id, stage_run identity, route identity, attempt idempotency, request idempotency, same-transaction flag, and MAS non-authority flags; request-only event/outbox/StageRun fragments remain transition_request_pending.

Provider-admission running-proof consumption now requires provider_admission_opl_transition_readback for the current action identity; a handoff running_provider_attempt flag without same-identity OPL live readback remains observability only, while a matching provider_admission_candidate may supply the readback without authorizing MAS to start the provider.

feature_audit.target: Delete or tombstone MAS private kernel, alias, selector/materializer authority, and local runtime-like surfaces.
evidence: MAS runtime-health local append API is retired.
Runtime surface inventory tracks remaining private surface tails.

domain_owner_action_dispatch has repo-level coverage for missing OPL proof fail-closed across every supported action, trusted OPL authorization, bound DomainProgressTransitionRuntime readback, and provider-hosted exact StageRun authorization.

domain_owner_action_dispatch now consumes the same helper-defined DomainProgressTransitionRuntime provider-admission identity binding as provider admission; readbacks missing explicit route_identity_key or attempt_idempotency_key fail closed as missing OPL authorization.

Legacy default_executor_execution/latest.json fallback is no longer consumed by current provider admission, provider handoff export, clean-migration recovery readers, default_executor_execution_candidates, default_executor_execution_receipt_consumption, or default_executor_execution_nonconsumable_closeout; legacy latest requires explicit history/replay opt-in.

Legacy default_executor_dispatch_request now has a machine-readable OPL DomainProgressTransitionRuntime intake-only and StageRun ABI/provenance-only no-authority boundary; runtime_surface_retirement rejects provider-admission, provider-running, and MAS-created StageRun regressions.

Legacy default-executor stage closeout packets emitted through default_executor_execution_candidates now carry explicit OPL StageRun closeout provenance and identity-recovery flags with provider_admission_authority=false, execution_authority=false, attempt_lifecycle_authority=false, and queue_authority=false.

Legacy default_executor_execution/latest.json now has a unified retirement_gate tied to the StageRun ABI active-caller scan; runtime_surface_retirement keeps no_active_stage_run_abi_caller_proven=false and physical_delete_allowed=false while active closeout consumers remain, and rejects tests or provenance-only scans as physical delete evidence.

domain_authority_refs_index active callers now route through opl_state_index_source_adapter and emit OPL StateIndex source-adapter proofs by default; db_path no longer implies MAS SQLite persistence, active callers do not receive a persist_sqlite parameter, and legacy SQLite writes require explicit opt-in for replay/local inspection.

domain_authority_refs_index legacy helper active-caller scan now proves no active replay/local-inspection consumers remain after the paper_progress_transition_refs opt-in removal, records the retired transition-ref SQLite opt-in only as provenance, and keeps physical_delete_allowed=false until live OPL StateIndexKernel takeover plus physical-delete/tombstone evidence exists.

domain_authority_refs_index OPL family adoption and product-entry persistence projections now read state_index_source_adapter manifests; legacy domain_authority_refs.sqlite inspection/payload helpers are history replay or local inspection only and cannot satisfy StateIndexKernel takeover.

domain_action_request_materializer no longer emits top-level request_tasks; request task refs are nested under legacy_request_task_diagnostics.legacy_request_task_refs with diagnostic_ref_only/body_authority=false and tests assert the alias is absent.
